violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Consultant list provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Cases of bottled beverages and ice cream cones were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Cases of single service items were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets on low boy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026
Allergen statement was not present on menu or point of sale/order. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Storage containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
